channel.title: byteFinancialiD
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from byteFinancialiD, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DeepSeek's AI breakthrough and the race for world models
item.description: Today's edition of The Download newsletter covers AI and world models.

item.title: Sereact gets Series B funding for Cortex 2.0 robot brain and U.S. expansion
item.description: Sereact to expand Cortex 2.0 beyond bin picking and open Boston office.

item.title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
item.description: AI adoption faces a major obstacle: rebuilding the data stack.

item.title: The missing step between hype and profit
item.description: This story from The Algorithm newsletter explores AI's hype-to-profit gap.
